title: Mise au vert
overview: To strengthen family ties, to free his teenagers from their digital addiction, to reconnect with his roots in the region of his childhood; this is why Régis decides to take his wife and children on a surprise vacation in the Vercors. An old ruined house lost in the forest. No water, no electricity, even less network or wifi. Nothing is going to happen as planned

trailers.title: MISE AU VERT Bande Annonce (2023) Frederick Guillaud, Comédie Française
